description_long: This is a square pillow with a white base fabric adorned with a bold black floral pattern, featuring stylized flowers and vines. The pillow appears plush and well-stuffed, giving it a soft, inviting appearance. The surface is smooth, likely made from cotton or a cotton-blend fabric, and the edges are neatly sewn. On one corner, there is a visible dark patch with white Chinese characters, possibly indicating a brand or material. The pillow's design is modern and decorative, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban settings. There are no visible zippers, buttons, or other interactive components.
description: A square, white pillow with a black floral pattern and a visible brand patch in one corner. The pillow looks soft, plush, and decorative.
description_view_0: Front view showing the floral pattern and a dark patch with white Chinese characters in the upper left corner.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the pillow's thickness and the symmetry of the floral pattern along the edge.
description_view_2: Back view with a continuation of the floral pattern and the brand patch now on the upper right corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, highlighting the pillow's depth and the mirrored floral design.
attribute_brand_logo: dark patch with white Chinese characters in the upper corner
